text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare for the Japanese Derby, it's essential
for Winning Ticket to condition herself to
long-distance races—so we aim for the Hopeful
Stakes first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how much we train for the race, though,
her time isn't improving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking pity on the struggling Winning Ticket,
Biwa Hayahide proposes that they hold a
three-way scrimmage with Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After racing against them, Winning Ticket
escapes her slump and even improves her own
record.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that having rivals is of great importance
to her.
